title: kit instance
description_html: Read-only browse of a kit serve SQLite store. See docs/inspect-with-datasette.md.

data.title: kit data
data.description: Engine document store and version DAG.

documents.description: Type-tagged JSON documents. (type, id) is the primary key. data is opaque JSON; the engine does not parse it.

versions.description: Persistent version DAG. seq is monotonic per (type, id); version_id is unique. See engine-versioned-sqlite spec.

version_parents.description: Parent edges in the version DAG. Schema supports branching even though VersionedDocumentStore appends linearly today.

snapshots.description: Full JSON payload per version_id. Joined to versions on version_id.

recent-mutations.title: Recent mutations across all types
recent-mutations.description: Last 200 versions written, with snapshot byte counts.
recent-mutations.sql:
select v.type, v.id, v.seq, v.created_at, v.hash, length(s.data) as snapshot_bytes
from versions v
join snapshots s using (version_id)
order by v.created_at desc
limit 200

history-for-document.title: Full history for one document
history-for-document.description: Pass type and id to see every version of one document, oldest first.
history-for-document.sql:
select v.seq, v.version_id, v.created_at, v.hash, length(s.data) as snapshot_bytes
from versions v
join snapshots s using (version_id)
where v.type = :type and v.id = :id
order by v.seq

branched-documents.title: Documents whose DAG has multiple heads
branched-documents.description: Documents with branched version histories (more than one head). VersionedDocumentStore appends linearly today, so heads > 1 is unexpected and worth investigating.
branched-documents.sql:
with heads as (
  select version_id from versions
  where version_id not in (select parent_id from version_parents)
)
select v.type, v.id, count(*) as head_count
from versions v
join heads using (version_id)
group by v.type, v.id
having count(*) > 1
order by head_count desc

type-summary.title: Document counts by type
type-summary.description: Total documents per type, with version counts.
type-summary.sql:
select d.type,
       count(distinct d.id) as document_count,
       count(v.version_id) as version_count
from documents d
left join versions v on v.type = d.type and v.id = d.id
group by d.type
order by document_count desc

orphan-snapshots.title: Orphan snapshots (FK integrity check)
orphan-snapshots.description: Snapshots whose version_id has no row in versions. Should always be empty if FK cascade is working.
orphan-snapshots.sql:
select s.version_id, length(s.data) as bytes
from snapshots s
left join versions v on v.version_id = s.version_id
where v.version_id is null

datasette-mask._comment: Coarse pattern-based masking. Mirror your kit redact rules here per environment.
